lfi_payloads.name: Deep Windows Traversal
lfi_payloads.description: Deep traversal to ensure we hit the C: root on enterprise Windows servers.

lfi_payloads.name: Windows Boot Ini
lfi_payloads.description: Targets the legacy Windows boot configuration file.

lfi_payloads.name: JSP Web Configuration
lfi_payloads.description: Specific to Java/JSP servers. Tries to read the internal web configuration file.

lfi_payloads.name: Standard Linux (Fallback)
lfi_payloads.description: Deep directory traversal for Linux systems.

lfi_payloads.name: Java Classes Bypass
lfi_payloads.description: Attempts to find Java application credential files.

lfi_payloads.name: Dot-Segment Bypass
lfi_payloads.description: Bypasses some poorly written '.. /' filters using single-dot segments.

lfi_payloads.name: Windows absolute (Direct)
lfi_payloads.description: Directly targets the Windows initialization file using an absolute path.
